publisher.name: Symloop Technology
publisher.positioning: AI-native engineering firm for MENA's regulated industries — banking, government, oil & gas, healthcare. Comparable in capability to Capgemini Engineering or Sopra Steria, at MENA cost basis. Not an agency, not an ESN, not a body shop.

skills.name: enterprise-software-engineering
skills.description: Production-grade enterprise software engineering — custom applications, multi-tenant SaaS, microservices, API platforms, and legacy modernization for banking, government, oil & gas, and industrial clients. 25+ engineer team, nearshore from Algiers.

skills.name: applied-ai-and-ml
skills.description: Applied AI and machine learning engineering — production computer vision, NLP (including Arabic), LLM/RAG systems, predictive analytics, MLOps. Senior team, compliance-aware, data-sovereignty options for regulated industries.

skills.name: erp-and-business-systems
skills.description: Custom ERP, CRM, WMS, GMAO/CMMS, GED/DMS, and BI platforms. We build, we don't resell. Multi-language (Arabic RTL, French, English), MENA payment integrations, on-prem and cloud deployment.

skills.name: cloud-and-devops
skills.description: Cloud migration, Kubernetes platform engineering, CI/CD, IaC (Terraform), observability, and SRE practice for AWS, Azure, GCP, and on-prem/hybrid deployments. Built for regulated industries with data residency constraints.

skills.name: mobile-engineering
skills.description: Production iOS (Swift), Android (Kotlin), and cross-platform (Flutter) mobile applications. Enterprise mobile platforms with backend complexity, offline-first design, multi-language (Arabic RTL/FR/EN), and MDM-ready distribution.
